candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate depreciation component in the operating section, but not labeled as cost of sales / COGS-related.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Materials and Services'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not identified as belonging to COGS. To avoid misallocating companywide/overhead D&A into COGS, no COGS-specific D&A row should be added separately.

candidates.why: This is the apparent D&A summary line at the same operating level as the selected SG&A component rows, but its label includes impairment, so using it risks violating the ignore-impairment rule.

Separate operating depreciation line outside the selected parent rows 'Personnel-Related Expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'; therefore it appears not already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation component at the same level as other expense buckets, suggesting it should be added separately to SG&A rather than treated as included in Personnel-Related Expenses or Other Operating Expenses.
Separate operating amortization component outside the selected SG&A component rows; should be added separately if not using the mixed summary line.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is the combination of 'Personnel-Related Expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'. The D&A rows appear as separate same-level operating lines, so they are not already embedded in those selected rows and should be added separately. Although 'Depreciation and impairment losses' looks like a summary, it explicitly includes impairment in the label, so the cleaner approach is to use the pure D&A component rows only. The below-EBIT 'Reserach and Development' row does not change this conclusion.
